# NCC CEMP College Unit

> Official portal of the NCC (National Cadet Corps) CEMP College Wing. Enrolment, activities, notices, photo gallery and cadet login — for cadets, parents and staff.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Unit overview, latest announcements, activity pillars and enrolment call-to-action.
- [Activities & Gallery](/activities): Event log — camps, treks, parades and service drives — plus a photo gallery.
- [Notices & Downloads](/notices): Searchable bulletin board for circulars, camp orders, forms, exam notifications and results.
- [About](/about): Unit motto, aims of the Corps, historical timeline since 1972, and officer / instructor profiles.
- [Contact](/contact): Unit office address, phone, email, map and an inquiry form for enrolment or alumni outreach.

## Optional

- [Login](/login): Role-based portal for cadets, teachers and administrators.
